_comment: Financial impact model for CASE-001 — Hamburg Precision Components GmbH. Simulates Finance department cost sheet. Used by Scenario Engine to compute estimated_cost_eur per scenario.
_note: WAIT cost formula: max(0, predicted_delay_days - inventory_coverage_days) × daily_downtime_cost_eur. For this case: (14 - 3) × 150000 = 1,650,000 EUR. Expedite avoids downtime entirely at 220,000 EUR. Replacement supplier avoids downtime at 350,000 EUR.
